title: Tattoo Gift Certificate Template, Editable Gothic Voucher for Tattoo Studio, Dark Luxury Printable Gift Card Canva
description:
Looking for a professional way to offer gift certificates at your tattoo studio? Stand out with this stunning dark gothic luxury design that perfectly matches your edgy brand aesthetic.

✨ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• 1 Editable gift certificate template (8.5" x 5.5")
• High-resolution 300 DPI for crisp printing
• Instant download PDF with Canva link
• Step-by-step editing instructions

🎨 HOW TO EDIT:
1. Click the Canva link provided in your download
2. Customize text fields with your studio name, amount, terms
3. Add your logo and branding colors
4. Download as PDF for printing or digital use

⚡ FEATURES:
• Professional dark luxury gothic aesthetic
• Fully editable in Canva (no design skills needed)
• Print at home or professional printer
• Multiple uses - save money on design costs
• Commercial license included for your business

🖤 PERFECT FOR:
• Tattoo studios and independent artists
• Holiday and birthday gift promotions
• Last-minute client gifts
• Building customer loyalty programs
• Professional studio branding materials

❓ FAQ:
• Do I need Canva Pro? No, this template works with free Canva accounts
• Can I change colors? Yes, all elements are fully customizable
• Is commercial use allowed? Yes, perfect for your tattoo business

📋 PLEASE NOTE:
This is a digital download only. No physical items will be shipped. Files are available immediately after purchase.
source_why: Gift certificates are the #1 selling digital template for tattoo studios. High demand, low competition for premium dark/gothic aesthetic. Average seller price £4.99-£7.99. Buyers searching for editable, professional gift cards they can customise in Canva.
